title: Paramahamsa Upanishad: The Highest Swan
description: From the Paramahamsa Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Paramahamsa Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: He has neither flag nor symbol. He is beyond pleasure and pain. He has abandoned all desires. He looks upon all beings with equal vision. He sees the world as a dream. He has reached the state of the supreme swan.
